arts.ttl: Player ‘close to moving’ to Sunderland – Black Cats sorting €7m+ signing detail
arts.sum: Sunderland are keen on signing Matija Frigan and are in talks with KVC Westerlo over a deal in the winter market. On Friday, Germanijak reported the Championship side are negotiating with Westerlo for a loan deal with a conditional obligation of €15m if the Black Cats return to the Premier League.
